section: Chapter: Verghese Kurien—I Too Had A Dream

questions.question: Who was Verghese Kurien?
questions.correct_answer: An Indian engineer and social entrepreneur known as the Father of the White Revolution
questions.explanation: Verghese Kurien played a key role in transforming India's dairy industry and improving the lives of millions of farmers.

questions.question: What is the White Revolution?
questions.correct_answer: A movement that increased milk production in India and strengthened dairy cooperatives
questions.explanation: The White Revolution made India one of the largest milk producers in the world through organised dairy development.

questions.question: Where did Verghese Kurien begin his work in the dairy sector?
questions.explanation: Kurien started his work in Anand, which later became the centre of India's dairy revolution.

questions.question: What is AMUL?
questions.correct_answer: A cooperative dairy organisation created to support farmers
questions.explanation: AMUL helped farmers sell milk collectively, ensuring fair prices and better income.

questions.question: What was Operation Flood?
questions.correct_answer: A nationwide dairy development program that expanded milk production and distribution
questions.explanation: Operation Flood helped connect milk producers with consumers and strengthened dairy cooperatives.

questions.question: Why were dairy cooperatives important for farmers?
questions.correct_answer: They helped farmers get fair prices and reduced dependence on middlemen
questions.explanation: Cooperative societies allowed farmers to work together and sell milk directly to organised markets.

questions.question: What leadership quality did Verghese Kurien show?
questions.correct_answer: Vision and determination to improve the lives of farmers
questions.explanation: Kurien believed that empowering farmers through cooperation could transform rural India.

questions.question: How did the White Revolution affect India?
questions.correct_answer: It made India one of the largest producers of milk in the world
questions.explanation: The revolution increased milk production and improved the economic conditions of farmers.

questions.question: What inspired Verghese Kurien to work for dairy farmers?
questions.correct_answer: His belief that organized cooperation could improve rural livelihoods
questions.explanation: Kurien dedicated his life to creating systems that empowered farmers economically.

questions.question: What lesson can we learn from Verghese Kurien’s life?
questions.correct_answer: Determination and vision can create positive change in society
questions.explanation: Kurien’s work shows how one person’s dedication can improve the lives of millions.

notes.title: Verghese Kurien
notes.content: Verghese Kurien was an engineer and social reformer who played a key role in transforming India's dairy industry.

notes.title: White Revolution
notes.content: The White Revolution was a major agricultural movement that increased milk production and strengthened dairy cooperatives across India.

notes.title: AMUL Cooperative
notes.content: AMUL became a successful cooperative model that helped farmers sell milk collectively and earn fair prices.

notes.title: Operation Flood
notes.content: Operation Flood was a nationwide program that expanded milk production, processing, and distribution across India.

notes.title: Impact on Farmers
notes.content: The dairy cooperative movement improved the economic conditions of millions of farmers in rural India.

facts.fact: Verghese Kurien is often called the Father of the White Revolution in India.
Anand in Gujarat became the centre of India's dairy revolution.
AMUL is one of the most successful dairy cooperative brands in India.
The White Revolution helped India become one of the largest milk producers in the world.
